name: Skeletal Cynder
description: Skeletal Cynder has risen from the darkness to join the Skylands!
biography: Skeletal Cynder is the Halloween 2013 counterpart of Cynder in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
quote: Skeletal Cynder has risen from the darkness to join the Skylands!

content: Skeletal Cynder has risen from the darkness to join the Skylands!

trivia: She is the first dragon Lost Islands exclusive Skylander.
She is also the first female Lost Islands exclusive, the second being Snowler Brawl.
